title: Rosé Takes a Lie Detector Test | Vanity Fair
description:
Rosé takes Vanity Fair's infamous lie detector test. Does she remember all the lyrics to her songs? Is BLACKPINK better than the Spice Girls? Did she actually try kissing Bruno Mars? Is 'the ex' Jaden Smith?
